milestone.title: Stage Graduation
milestone.goal: When the MVP is covered, ADD proposes the move to production as an analytics-driven, interview-led roadmap of milestones the human confirms before the stage ever advances.

graduation-analytics.title: Read-only graduation-report: cluster MVP-loop evidence (gather, not judge)

graduate-guide.title: graduate.md orchestration: cue → analytics → interview → production roadmap → confirmed flip

stage-book-align.title: Align docs/10 + GLOSSARY: stage-graduation reads consistently with setup/intake/loop
